caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two participants: an older woman on the left, who seems to be Margaret Harrington, and an older man on the right, likely Greg Delanty. Both individuals are engaged in conversation, with the woman speaking and the man listening attentively. The background of the woman's setting includes some decorative elements like string lights, while the man is in a room with a blue wall and framed pictures. The overall tone suggests a serious and thoughtful dialogue about the pressing issue of climate change, as highlighted by the title of the poems being discussed.
